report_data.complaint: Patient visited the clinic with complaints of fever and body pain.
report_data.symptoms: Fever, body pain, headache, fatigue, loss of appetite
report_data.duration: Symptoms started 3 days ago, with gradual worsening.
report_data.background_history: Patient is a 21-year-old male, AB+ blood group, with no known medical history.
report_data.clinical_observations: Patient appears lethargic, with a temperature of 38.5°C (101.3°F).
report_data.diagnosis: Possible viral infection, differential diagnoses include dengue fever, malaria, and typhoid fever.
report_data.treatment_advice: Patient advised to rest, drink plenty of fluids, and take paracetamol for fever and pain.
report_data.action_plan: Follow-up appointment in 2 days, with blood tests to confirm the diagnosis.
report_data.immunization_data: Patient is up-to-date with all routine vaccinations.
report_data.verification_notes: Patient confirmed experiencing fever and body pain for the past 3 days.
report_data.doctor_notes: Patient's symptoms are consistent with a viral infection. Will monitor for any signs of complications.
